zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland於大約1160年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷埃爾金時，他的父親William Murray of Sutherland23歲，母親Deolifard Oliphant19歲。他於1180年之前與Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1220年在英國蘇格蘭莫雷度福斯享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾度福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland于大约1160年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷埃爾金时，他的父亲William Murray of Sutherland23岁，母亲Deolifard Oliphant19岁。他于1180年之前与Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1220年在英国苏格兰莫雷度福斯享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾爾金爾度福斯。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland was born about 1160, in Elgin, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Murray of Sutherland, was 23 and his mother, Deolifard Oliphant, was 19. He married Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife before 1180, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1220, in Duffus, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland est né environ 1160, à Elgin, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Murray of Sutherland, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Deolifard Oliphant, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife avant 1180, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1220, à Duffus, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Duffus, Elginshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland um 1160 in Elgin, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Murray of Sutherland 23 und seine Mutter Deolifard Oliphant 19. Er hat vor 1180 in Scotland Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1220 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Duffus, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland è nato il circa 1160 nel Elgin, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Murray of Sutherland, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Deolifard Oliphant, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife prima del 1180, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1220, nel Duffus, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherlandが約1160年にイギリススコットランドモーアイエルジンで生まれた時，父William Murray of Sutherlandは23歳，母Deolifard Oliphantは19歳であった。1180年以前にスコットランドでBaroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fifeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1220年にイギリススコットランドモーアイダフウスで62歳で死去し，スコットランドエルジンシュアイアダフウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 엘긴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Murray of Sutherland(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Deolifard Oliphant(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1180년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1220년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 더프스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 더프스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Elgin, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Murray of Sutherland, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Deolifard Oliphant, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife antes 1180, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1220, em Duffus, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland родился около 1160 г. в местности элгин, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Murray of Sutherland было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Deolifard Oliphant, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife перед 1180 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1220 г. в местности дуффус, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности дуффус, элгиншир, Шотландия.

sm.Abt 1160–Abt 1220: e tusa o le 1160–e tusa o le 1220

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Freskin de Moravia Lord of Duffus and Sutherland nació aproximadamente 1160, en Elgin, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Murray of Sutherland, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Deolifard Oliphant, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Baroness Annabela MacDuff Of Fife antes de 1180, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1220, en Duffus, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland.
